calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-12-2004 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carlito Mandia.
Petition brought by the Defendants' firm of Phillips, Spallas & Fotouhi LLP.
Elisa Rhein, Esq. for Defendants: Mahmoud Larizabeh, Robert Johnson and Tara Johnson.
Cathy Mosbrucker, Esq. for Petitioner: Barton Sparagon, present as guardian ad litem for Wesley Sparagon and Jeremy Sparagon, minors Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Compromise of $2,000.00 to each of the minor, in return for covenant not to sue Defendants in the future for damages relating to the parents' tenancy at Defendants' building in San Francisco.
Proceeds to each of the minor to be delivered to Petitioner for deposit into an account in minor's name.
Order signed in court.
